visual_attributes.morphology: collection of loose, randomly oriented ice crystals
distinctive_features: various shapes including elliptical disks, dendrites, and needles
visual_attributes.size_and_scale: individual crystals are millimeter and sub-millimeter in size

domain_specific_visual.aggregation: can accumulate into grease ice on water surface

domain_specific_functional.ecological_impact: can cause flooding and damage to infrastructure
domain_specific_functional.industrial_impact: affects hydropower and water supply facilities

relationships.description: Frazil ice forms in turbulent water conditions.
Frazil ice can accumulate and transform into grease ice.

contextual_attributes.origin: forms in cold, turbulent water environments
contextual_attributes.geographic_range: rivers, lakes, reservoirs, oceans in cold regions
contextual_attributes.cultural_significance: important in understanding ice formation and its impact on infrastructure
